items.name_en: 🆕 M12656 Green! BRAZZA Wallet. Crafted from Monogram Heritage canvas, this Brazza wallet showcases Pharrell Williams' fresh take on the iconic Monogram pattern. Interwoven textures and the Marque L.Vuitton Déposée label highlight classic Damier elements, paired with multiple card slots and compartments for a functional long design.

🆕 M12660 Yellow! COIN Wallet
Pharrell Williams incorporates traditional elements of the brand's Damier print into this Coin wallet, featuring interlaced texture and a Marque L.Vuitton Déposée logo to creatively reshape the classic Monogram pattern, combining practical function with elegant style.

(Height x Width x Length)

items.name_cn:
🆕 M12664 Yellow! ENVELOPE Card Holder
This card holder features a slim silhouette built with Monogram Heritage canvas, easily fitting into a pocket or handbag. The flap is secured with a hidden snap button, revealing an accordion pocket and card slots upon opening. The calfskin lining and Marque L.Vuitton Déposée logo, derived from Damier canvas, add refined details.
8 x 1 x 10.5 cm
(Height x Width x Length)

🆕 M13185
This magnetic card holder is made of Monogram Macassar canvas, featuring bright leather lining and V-shaped card slots for a striking look, securely holding credit cards and transit cards. It has an integrated magnet for easy attachment to iPhone models with MagSafe technology.
Size: 9.5 x 0.5 x 6.5 cm

items.name_en: 🆕 M14628 Blue! This small accessory cleverly blends classic and chic. It is made of iconic Monogram canvas, revealing a vibrant leather lining upon opening. This practical yet fun design is accented with an enamel charm and a metal charm, both featuring Louis' signature Monogram floral pattern. It can hold cash, coins, and three cards. 9x10x2.5cm

items.name_en: 🆕 M237 Champagne【Top-tier Original】Dynamic Code Synced with Counter Electronic Chip. The Pochette Louise chain bag renews the classic design with a new proportion. Exquisite glossy Epi leather or stylish matte leather creates the bag body, securely storing essentials for evening outings. Paired with a lustrous chain, it can be elegantly carried over the shoulder or in hand. 22 x 14 x 5

items.name_cn:
🆕 M24708 White Denim
OnTheGo MM Handbag Nautical Series
This OnTheGo MM is part of the Nautical Capsule, made from Monogram Zph jacquard fabric created with 66 different colored threads featuring soft color gradients. To ensure durability, the fabric is treated with an invisible protective coating. Each model comes with a laser-engraved mirror charm for a touch of polish on the go. Dimensions: 35×27×14 cm

specs.rawTitle:
🆕 M24708 White Denim
OnTheGo MM Handbag Nautical Series
This OnTheGo MM is part of the Nautical Capsule, made from Monogram Zph jacquard fabric created with 66 different colored threads featuring soft color gradients. To ensure durability, the fabric is treated with an invisible protective coating. Each model comes with a laser-engraved mirror charm for a touch of polish on the go. Dimensions: 35×27×14 cm

items.name_cn:
🆕 M24905 White
Neverfull MM Handbag
This spacious Neverfull MM is part of the Nautical Capsule, featuring colorful Monogram Blossoms. Sixty-six colorful threads, in subtle gradient colors, are interwoven to create a jacquard pattern. Attached to the long shoulder strap is a laser-engraved mirror charm. It includes a matching removable zip pocket inside. Dimensions: 31-28-14 cm.

specs.rawTitle:

Attached to the long shoulder strap is a laser-engraved mirror charm. It includes a matching removable zip pocket inside. Dimensions: 31-28-14 cm.

items.name_cn:
New M40489
Featuring the classic Louis Vuitton Monogram canvas, this apron bag is trimmed with natural cowhide and gold hardware, harmoniously designed. The unique silhouette is inspired by the iconic travel trunk. It has two top handles and a pad made of round dry leather. Decorated with the Louis Vuitton logo, plus seasonal bright pink and orange accent details, this item features a detachable strap and can be worn as a shoulder bag or crossbody bag. 20.5 x 13.5 x 12 cm (Length x Height x Width)

specs.rawTitle:
New M40489
Featuring the classic Louis Vuitton Monogram canvas, this apron bag is trimmed with natural cowhide and gold hardware, harmoniously designed. The unique silhouette is inspired by the iconic travel trunk. It has two top handles and a pad made of round dry leather. Decorated with the Louis Vuitton logo, plus seasonal bright pink and orange accent details, this item features a detachable strap and can be worn as a shoulder bag or crossbody bag. 20.5 x 13.5 x 12 cm (Length x Height x Width)

items.name_cn:
🆕 M41815 Black
LOCKME Backpack
Soft leather material and iconic LV turnlock design. This Lockme backpack further enriches the versatile Lockme series with a brand-new look. Lightweight, feminine, and lively, it is the ideal companion for a busy woman's daily life: can be carried as a shoulder bag or worn on the back to enhance functionality. Dimensions: 22.0 x 28.0 x 13.0 cm

items.name_en: 🆕 M47199 Dynamic Code Top-tier Original OnTheGo Small Handbag from the collaboration series between the brand and Chinese artist Sun Yitian, featuring cute duck motifs on the glossy calfskin and a deep microfiber lining echoing the original background. The top handle and detachable, adjustable shoulder strap complete the look.
